title: Hybrid Evolutionary Assessment based on Logic Programming: A Novel Approach for Complex Problem Solving
title_es: Evaluación evolutiva híbrida basada en programación lógica: un enfoque novedoso para resolución de problemas complejos
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un enfoque híbrido que combina computación evolutiva con programación lógica para abordar problemas de optimización complejos.
abstract: Complex optimization problems often require innovative hybrid approaches. This paper proposes a hybrid evolutionary algorithm enhanced with logic programming mechanisms, demonstrating superior performance on challenging benchmark problems.

citations.apa: Molina, M., & Herrera, F. (2024). Hybrid Evolutionary Assessment based on Logic Programming: A Novel Approach for Complex Problem Solving. Proceedings MAEB 2024.
citations.mla: Molina, María, and Francisco Herrera. "Hybrid Evolutionary Assessment based on Logic Programming: A Novel Approach for Complex Problem Solving." Proceedings MAEB 2024, 2024.
